SEARCH
Package org.key_project.proofmanagement.check

Class CheckerData

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.proofmanagement.check.CheckerData
All Implemented Interfaces:
Logger
public final class CheckerData extends Object implements Logger
This container serves for accumulating data given to checkers and results returned by them.

  • Method Details

    • getCheckDate

      public String getCheckDate()

    • getContractsWithoutProof

      public Set<Contract> getContractsWithoutProof()

    • addContractWithoutProof

      public void addContractWithoutProof(Contract c, boolean internal)

    • getChoiceNames

      public SortedSet<String> getChoiceNames()

    • addReferenceChoices

      public void addReferenceChoices(Map<String,String> choices)
      Adds a choices map to the map of reference choices. The newly added map gets the next free id. Use only if it is known that the given choices object is not yet in the map! In addition, an entry in the map for id lookup is added (addChoices(Map) is called).
      Parameters:
      choices - the reference choices to add

    • addChoices

      public void addChoices(Map<String,String> choices)
      Adds a mapping to a reference choices id for the given choices. Use only if an equal reference choices object has already been added via addReferenceChoices(Map).
      Parameters:
      choices - the choices to add a mapping

    • getChoices2Id

      public Map<Map<String,String>,Integer> getChoices2Id()

    • getShortChoices2Id

      public Map<Map<String,String>,Integer> getShortChoices2Id()
      Prepare short names for concise display of ChoiceSettings: In the values, everything up to and including the colon is removed.
      Returns:
      a map of choice settings to reference id, using short choice values
